channel.title: Asset Forge
channel.description: 75 design assets (icons, illustrations, landing templates) for indie hackers. MIT for open-source, $29 for commercial.

item.title: Asset Forge v1.0 launched
item.description: 60 SVG icons across 6 categories, 12 illustrations, 3 landing templates. All hand-composed geometry. Download under MIT from GitHub: https://github.com/razel369/asset-forge-bundle

item.title: Hire Asset Forge for custom work
item.description: Custom icon packs, illustrations, and landing templates built to your spec. Fixed price $99 / $149 / $249 / $599. Delivered in 5-7 days.

item.title: Support Asset Forge on Ko-fi
item.description: Tip the project. $5-$30 one-time, or $9/month for sponsor tier with roadmap votes.
